basic_details.job_title: KRIBHCO Graduate Engineer Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Krishak Bharati Cooperative (KRIBHCO) Graduate Engineer Trainee Notification 2026 has been released on the official website kribhco.net. Have been announced through the KRIBHCO Graduate Engineer Trainee Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 27 years as on 30-04-2026. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

qualification.details: GATE-2026 qualified in respective discipline. B.Tech/B.E. with 65% aggregate from 35 approved institutes (31 NITs + 4 institutes). 60% in Class X and XII. 2026 pass out/passing out. No gaps/backlogs in graduation.

salary_details.details: Stipend during training: Rs. 55,000/- to Rs. 1,30,000/- Per Month.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of KRIBHCO to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the KRIBHCO GET recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the KRIBHCO Graduate Engineer Trainee (GET) recruitment is 21-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the GET post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a GATE-2026 Score Card, a B.Tech/B.E. degree with at least 65% aggregate from approved institutes, and 60% in Class X and XII. They should be 2026 pass-outs with no academic gaps or backlogs.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Graduate Engineer Trainee position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Graduate Engineer Trainee (GET) post is 27 years as of 30-04-2026.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for KRIBHCO GET recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Graduate Engineer Trainee post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a stipend during training ranging from Rs. 55,000/- to Rs. 1,30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the KRIBHCO Graduate Engineer Trainee (GET) position?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official KRIBHCO website or the direct application link provided in the 'Important Links' section before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. Which disciplines are covered under the Graduate Engineer Trainee (GET) recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for GETs in Chemical, Mechanical, Electrical, Instrumentation, and Computer disciplines.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: The official notification indicates 0 total vacancies for the Graduate Engineer Trainee (GET) posts.

faq.question: Q9. Where is KRIBHCO located?
faq.answer: KRIBHCO is located in Surat, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Graduate Engineer Trainee (GET) position is Full Time.
